primaryName: Penfield Senior Programs (DEAR) / Bri-Pen Senior Rides

webVerification.sourceLabel: Town of Penfield DEAR senior programs page
webVerification.notes: Web confirms 585-340-8674 as Penfield Senior Programs / Bri-Pen Senior Rides line. Bri-Pen Senior Rides is a transportation program for ambulatory seniors 65+ in Brighton/Penfield (medical appointments + religious services).
